ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coffee_shops" (
  "coffee_shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coffee shop */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coffee shop */,
  "map_url" TEXT /* URL of the coffee shop's location on a map */,
  "img_url" TEXT /* URL of the coffee shop's image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the coffee shop */,
  "has_sockets" INTEGER /* Whether the coffee shop has sockets */,
  "has_toilet" INTEGER /* Whether the coffee shop has a toilet */,
  "has_wifi" INTEGER /* Whether the coffee shop has Wi-Fi */,
  "can_take_calls" INTEGER /* Whether the coffee shop can take calls */,
  "seats" TEXT /* Number of seats available */,
  "coffee_price" REAL /* Price of a coffee */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the coffee shop */,
  "cuisine_types" TEXT /* Types of cuisine offered */,
  "payment_options" TEXT /* Payment methods accepted */,
  "average_wait_time" TEXT /* Average wait time for service */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the coffee shop's website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the coffee shop details were updated */,
  "verified" INTEGER /*  Indicates if the coffee shop listing is verified */,
  "cuisine_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the cuisine */,
  "parking_available" INTEGER /* Whether parking is available */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Whether the coffee shop is wheelchair accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coffee_shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "coffee_shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee shop being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_response" TEXT /* Response from the coffee shop owner to the review */,
  "review_response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was left */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_coffee_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("coffee_shop_id") REFERENCES coffee_shops ("coffee_shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (customer, coffee shop owner, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coffee_shop_owners" (
  "coffee_shop_owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coffee shop owner */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the coffee shop owner */,
  "coffee_shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee shop owned by the user */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Registered business name */,
  "business_email" TEXT /* Business email address */,
  "business_phone_number" TEXT /* Business contact phone number */,
  "business_website_url" TEXT /* URL of the business website */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date the coffee shop owner was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coffee_shop_owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_shop_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_shop_owners_coffee_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("coffee_shop_id") REFERENCES coffee_shops ("coffee_shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coffee_shop_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "coffee_shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee shop being analyzed */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the coffee shop */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews left for the coffee shop */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings given to the coffee shop */,
  "num_visits" INTEGER /* Number of visits to the coffee shop */,
  "average_wait_time" TEXT /* Average wait time for service */,
  "average_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Average satisfaction score from customer surveys */,
  "num_satisfaction_surveys" INTEGER /* Number of satisfaction surveys completed */,
  "last_analytics_update" TEXT /* Last time the analytics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_shop_analytics_coffee_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("coffee_shop_id") REFERENCES coffee_shops ("coffee_shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_source" TEXT /* Source of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "coffee_shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee shop mentioned in the post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the social media post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the social media post was created */,
  "post_source" TEXT /* Source of the social media post */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the social media post */,
  "post_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "post_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "post_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_coffee_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("coffee_shop_id") REFERENCES coffee_shops ("coffee_shop_id")
)
